name: lightprobe-configure-lights
title: LightProbe / Configure Lights
description: Batch-configure Light bake modes in the scene. Each entry specifies a name pattern (supports * wildcard) and a target mode (Realtime, Baked, Mixed). Use 'lightprobe-analyze' first to inspect all lights and their current modes, then decide which lights to change based on the analysis.

commonMistakes: Parameter is namePattern (string, supports * wildcards), NOT gameObjectRef (object)
No intensity field; only namePattern and mode
notes: Use lightprobe-analyze first to inspect current light configuration before modifying
